issues.description: Duplicate regex pattern: BASH_WRITE_PATTERNS contains identical pattern /\bcp\b.*\s+(crates|src|src-tauri)\// at both line 42 and line 48. The second entry is redundant.
issues.suggestion: Remove the duplicate line 48 entry from BASH_WRITE_PATTERNS array.

details.h3_input_validation: PASS - stdin JSON parsed in try/catch, malformed input exits 2 (fail-closed). File path validation uses anchored regex. Bash command parsing extracts targets before checking.
details.h4_error_handling: PASS - All error paths exit with code 2 (fail-closed). Error messages logged to stderr without leaking sensitive data. JSON.parse wrapped in try/catch.
details.h5_access_control: PASS - No eval(), no child_process.exec(), spawnSync uses array args without shell:true. Path traversal low risk (fixed component names in path.join).

quality_review.function_length: PASS - Longest function extractBashWriteTargets ~40 lines, checkBashCommand ~27 lines, all under 50 line limit
quality_review.file_length: PASS - workflow-check.cjs is 293 lines, well under 800 line limit
quality_review.nesting_depth: PASS - Maximum nesting depth is 3-4 levels, within acceptable range
quality_review.error_handling: PASS - Fail-closed strategy throughout. JSON parse errors, missing project root, and missing artifacts all correctly exit with code 2
quality_review.naming: PASS - Clear, descriptive function and variable names (checkBashCommand, extractBashWriteTargets, WORKFLOW_REQUIRED_PATTERNS_IN_COMMAND)
quality_review.code_reuse: PASS - No duplicate implementations detected. checkFilePath is reused by both Edit/Write and MultiEdit paths

categories_covered: bash_interception (11 tests) - sed -i, redirect, append, read-only, excluded files, empty/missing command, with/without workflow
multiedit_handling (7 tests) - file_path singular, file_paths plural, excluded files, empty array, with/without workflow
directory_checks (2 tests) - outside protected dirs, scripts/ directory
workflow_state_checks (5 tests) - no artifacts, no active task, active workflow, src/ with workflow, src-tauri/ without workflow
error_handling_fail_closed (2 tests) - malformed JSON, empty stdin
multi_task_boundary (2 tests) - latest active allows, all completed blocks
missing_input_boundary (2 tests) - missing file_path, undefined tool_input
test_coverage_review.coverage_assessment: PASS - Comprehensive coverage of normal paths, error paths, boundary conditions, and security-sensitive scenarios. Test paths align with production execution paths.

fixes_verification.bash_tool_interception_bug: VERIFIED - WORKFLOW_REQUIRED_PATTERNS_IN_COMMAND (without ^ anchors) correctly matches protected directories within command strings. sed -i, redirect >, and append >> all properly blocked.
fixes_verification.multiedit_file_paths_support: VERIFIED - MultiEdit correctly checks file_paths array (plural) with fallback to file_path (singular).
fixes_verification.vitest_config_cjs_extension: VERIFIED - vitest.hooks.config.ts now includes .cjs extension in test discovery pattern.
fixes_verification.excluded_files_logic: VERIFIED - Returns blocked:false when all extracted targets are excluded file types.
